{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Noroloth’s Remnant
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Noroloth’s Remnant]] is a [[Herald Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Noroloth]]'s [[Remnant]] flew closer to the cavern entrance.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Remnants]]
